answers: Data Structures: ways to organize data. Key ones: Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Trees, Graphs, Hash Maps. Essential for coding interviews!
DSA learning path: Arrays and Strings first, then Linked Lists, Stacks/Queues, Trees, Graphs, and finally Dynamic Programming. Practice daily on LeetCode.
For interviews: master Arrays, Hash Maps, Two Pointers, Binary Search, BFS/DFS, and Dynamic Programming. Solve at least 150 LeetCode problems.
Array = fixed size, fast access by index. Linked List = dynamic size, fast insert/delete. Choose based on your use case. Both are fundamental!
